page_metadata.biotools__summary: Europe PMC citations viewer. It retrieves and displays the principal data (such as authors list, title, journal and source) either of a single citation or of the citations list that matches the query specified in the Europe PMC.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Europe PMC citations viewer. It retrieves and displays the principal data (such as authors list, title, journal and source) either of a single citation or of the citations list that matches the query specified in the Europe PMC.
